headline: Trump Says 'I Want Kevin To Be Totally Independent,' But Prediction Markets Don't Believe In Cuts
summary: President Donald Trump told the room he wants Kevin Warsh “totally independent” as he swore him in as Federal Reserve chairman Friday, then spent the next hour arguing the economy can boom without inflation. The price data has other ideas. Annual inflation hit 3.8% in April, the highest since 2023, up from 2.4% before the war with Iran closed the Strait of Hormuz and sent energy prices climbing. Core inflation held at 2.8%, well above the Fed’s 2% target. Crude has stayed nearly 50% above pre-co

headline: More Gas Per Barrel of Oil: A Growth Lever for Permian Operators
summary: WTI above $95 per barrel is boosting Permian oil and associated gas, acting as a tailwind for FANG, XOM and CVX.

headline: Egypt to ship Cypriot gas to Europe in QatarEnergy deal
summary: QatarEnergy and ExxonMobil have signed a deal with Egypt to pipe Cypriot offshore gas to Egyptian liquefaction facilities for export to Europe — the latest sign that Egypt is becoming the Eastern Mediterranean's dominant energy hub.View on euronews

headline: ConocoPhillips (COP) and Glenfarne’s Alaska LNG Sign 30-Year Natural Gas Supply Agreement
summary: ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) is one of the Most Undervalued US Stocks According to Hedge Funds. headline: The Dividend Stocks That Can Replace a $65,000 Income and What They’ll Cost You
summary: Replacing a real paycheck with dividends is the cleanest version of financial independence. The income target here is $65,000 per year, roughly the US median individual wage, and the question is whether a $650,000 portfolio can actually produce it. The honest answer up front: only by reaching past pure blue chips into higher-yield categories. Here ... The Dividend Stocks That Can Replace a $65,000 Income and What They’ll Cost You

headline: Prediction: Alphabet Will Join the $5 Trillion Club and the Dow Jones Industrial Average in June
